title: tragacantha alberti
intro: Tragacantha alberti, also known as Albert's goat's thorn, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its pods which are used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Tragacantha alberti include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's pods are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
